Parameter.Name: Elig_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Eligible are children and teenagers from 1st. to 12th grade under 21 that are enrolled in public education. People of any age that are enrolled in alternative or special education systems are eligible too.

Parameter.Name: Elig_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Eligible are pregnant women between 13 and 50 who are non-contributors to Social Security.

Parameter.Comment: Juana Azurduy Bonus: 50 Bs. for each prenatal control (4).

Parameter.Comment: Juana Azurduy Bonus: 125 Bs. for each bi-monthly health check until 2 years.

Parameter.Comment: Juana Azurduy Bonus: 120 Bs. for give birth at public health facilities.

Parameter.Name: Comp_perTU
Parameter.Comment: Old Age pension for SIC contributors is 2.600 Bs annual (2015) / 3.900 Bs annual (2019).

Parameter.Comment: Eligible are men and women over 60 that are contributors to social security.

Policy.Name: brwot_bo
Policy.Comment: BEN: Bono contra el Hambre (Reactivación Económica) POST COVID-19 CASH TRANSFER

Parameter.Name: Elig_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Eligible are people between 18 and 59 years old which are receiving the Universal Bond or the Juana Azurduy Bond and are not enrolled or have received the Family Bond. This bond could also be received by people with disabilities and people that are not enrolled in social security. This bond will also be available for independent workers enrolled in social security.

Parameter.Name: Formula
Parameter.Comment: A unique cash transfer of 1000 Bs.

Parameter.Name: Elig_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Eligible are children and teenagers from 1st. to 12th grade under 21 that are enrolled in public education. People of any age that are enrolled in alternative or special education systems are eligible too.

Parameter.Name: Elig_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Eligible are pregnant women between 13 and 50 who are non-contributors to Social Security.

Parameter.Name: Formula
Parameter.Comment: Juana Azurduy Bonus: 50 Bs. for each prenatal control (4).

Parameter.Name: Formula
Parameter.Comment: Juana Azurduy Bonus: 125 Bs. for each bi-monthly health check until 2 years.

Parameter.Name: Elig_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Eligible are pregnant women who give birth at public health facilities.

Parameter.Name: Formula
Parameter.Comment: Juana Azurduy Bonus: 120 Bs. for give birth at public health facilities.

Parameter.Name: Elig_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Eligible are children under 2 years whose mothers are non-contributors to Social Security

Parameter.Name: Comp_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Eligible are men and women over 60 that are non-contributors to social security.

Parameter.Name: Comp_perTU
Parameter.Comment: Old Age pension for SIC non-contributors is 3.250 Bs annual (2015) / 4.550 Bs annual (2019).

Parameter.Name: Comp_perTU
Parameter.Comment: Old Age pension for SIC contributors is 2.600 Bs annual (2015) / 3.900 Bs annual (2019).

Parameter.Name: Comp_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Eligible are men and women over 60 that are contributors to social security.

Policy.Name: bfaot_bo

Parameter.Name: Elig_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Eligible are students enroled in public and private schools and high schools (from 1st to 12th grade)

Parameter.Name: Formula
Parameter.Comment: A unique cash transfer of 500 Bs.

Policy.Name: bcaot_bo
Policy.Comment: BEN: Family Basket (Beneficiarios BJA y RD) COVID-19 CASH TRANSFER

Parameter.Name: Elig_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Eligible are beneficiaries of Renta Dignidad and Juana Azurduy Bond

Parameter.Name: Formula
Parameter.Comment: A unique cash transfer of 400 Bs.

Policy.Name: bwkot_bo
Policy.Comment: BEN: Universal Bond for people not enroled in other benefits (BJA, BJP, RD, BF, CF) COVID-19 CASH TRANSFER

Parameter.Name: Elig_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Eligible are people between 18 and 59 years of age not affiliated to Social Security and not enroled in any other bond.
Parameter.Value: (bfaot_s=0 & bcaot_s=0 & bsaoa=0 & bmapr=0 & bmacc=0 & bed=0) & (lim=0) & (dag>17 & dag<60)

Parameter.Name: Formula
Parameter.Comment: A unique cash transfer of 500 Bs.

Policy.Name: brwot_bo
Policy.Comment: BEN: Bono contra el Hambre (Reactivación Económica) POST COVID-19 CASH TRANSFER

Parameter.Name: Elig_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Eligible are people between 18 and 59 years old which are receiving the Universal Bond or the Juana Azurduy Bond and are not enrolled or have received the Family Bond. This bond could also be received by people with disabilities and people that are not enrolled in social security. This bond will also be available for independent workers enrolled in social security.

Parameter.Name: Formula
Parameter.Comment: A unique cash transfer of 1000 Bs.

Parameter.Comment: Eligible are pregnant women between 13 and 50 who are non-contributors to Social Security.

Parameter.Comment: Juana Azurduy Bonus: 50 Bs. for each prenatal control (4).

Parameter.Comment: Juana Azurduy Bonus: 125 Bs. for each bi-monthly health check until 2 years.

Parameter.Name: Elig_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Eligible are pregnant women who give birth at public health facilities.

Parameter.Name: Formula
Parameter.Comment: Juana Azurduy Bonus: 120 Bs. for give birth at public health facilities.

Parameter.Name: Elig_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Eligible are children under 2 years whose mothers are non-contributors to Social Security

Parameter.Name: Comp_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Eligible are men and women over 60 that are non-contributors to social security.

Parameter.Name: Comp_perTU
Parameter.Comment: Old Age pension for SIC non-contributors is 3.250 Bs annual (2015) / 4.550 Bs annual (2019).

Parameter.Name: Comp_perTU
Parameter.Comment: Old Age pension for SIC contributors is 2.600 Bs annual (2015) / 3.900 Bs annual (2019).

Parameter.Name: Comp_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Eligible are men and women over 60 that are contributors to social security.

Policy.Name: brwot_bo
Policy.Comment: BEN: Bono contra el Hambre (Reactivación Económica) POST COVID-19 CASH TRANSFER

Parameter.Name: Elig_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Eligible are people between 18 and 59 years old which are receiving the Universal Bond or the Juana Azurduy Bond and are not enrolled or have received the Family Bond. This bond could also be received by people with disabilities and people that are not enrolled in social security. This bond will also be available for independent workers enrolled in social security.

Parameter.Name: Formula
Parameter.Comment: A unique cash transfer of 1000 Bs.

Policy.Name: brwot_bo
Policy.Comment: BEN: Bono contra el Hambre (Reactivación Económica) POST COVID-19 CASH TRANSFER

Parameter.Name: Elig_Cond
Parameter.Comment: Eligible are people between 18 and 59 years old which are receiving the Universal Bond or the Juana Azurduy Bond and are not enrolled or have received the Family Bond. This bond could also be received by people with disabilities and people that are not enrolled in social security. This bond will also be available for independent workers enrolled in social security.

Parameter.Name: Formula
Parameter.Comment: A unique cash transfer of 1000 Bs.
